violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location/container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the prep unit located in the prep room was observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
